channel.title: Markets News Today
channel.description: Breaking news and expert analysis on business, finance, technology and world affairs.

item.title: Bitcoin Price Prediction June 2026
item.description: Bitcoin's price is expected to reach $50,000 by the end of June 2026, according to expert predictions. The cryptocurrency market is highly volatile, and several factors will influence Bitcoin's price in the coming months. Read on to learn more about the bull and bear cases for Bitcoin's price prediction.
